input.command:
uv run - << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd

agent_file = "outputs/failed_students_output.xlsx"
ref_file = "uploads-answers/file-management/EVAL_FM_009/failed_students_output.xlsx"

agent_df = pd.read_excel(agent_file)
ref_df = pd.read_excel(ref_file)

print("=== AGENT OUTPUT ===")
print(f"Shape: {agent_df.shape}")
print(f"Columns: {list(agent_df.columns)}")
print(agent_df.to_string())

print("\n=== REFERENCE OUTPUT ===")
print(f"Shape: {ref_df.shape}")
print(f"Columns: {list(ref_df.columns)}")
print(ref_df.to_string())
EOF
input.description: Compare agent output vs reference output xlsx files
